raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir es premekeſchũ tai Dee-
nã wiſus/ kas pahr to Sleekſ-
ni lezz/ kas ſawo Kunga Nam-
mu peepilda ar Warras-Dar-
ba un Wiltibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tai Deenã zelſeeß/ ſak-
ka tas KUNGS: Weena brehſ-
dama Balkſne no to Siwju
Wahrtim/ un weena Rauſchana
no tahm ohtrahm Wahrtim/ un
weena leela Satreeſchana no
teem Pakalneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rauzeek juhß Eedſihwo-
tajt Leijas Weetã / jo wiſſi
Prezzineeku Landis irr iſdeldeți/
wiſſi Naudas Krahejt irr no-
waitati.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tanni Laikã iſmeke-
fchu es Jeruſalemi ar Lukteem/
un peemekeſchu tohs Wihrus'/
kas us ſawahm Meelehm gull/
kas ſawãß Sirdis ſakka: Tas
KUNGS ne darra Labbu nedß
Launu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz taps wihaß Pa-
Gr. dohms par Laupiſchanu / un
wihaß Nammi par Pohſtiſcha-
nu. Tee Ganni uhſtaifa Nam-
mus/bet eekſch teem ne dſihwohs.
Tee dehſta Wiha-Dahrsus/ bet
wihaß Wihaß ne dsers.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta leela Deena ta KUN-
GA irr tuwn/ un ſteidsahe toh-
ti. Kad ta KUNGA Deenas
Balkſne nahß/ tad tee Warrenee
ganscht brehks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Schi Deena buhß weena
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bahrſibas Deena/ weena B-
du un Bailibas Deena/ wee
Wehtraß un Pohſtiſchanas D-
na/ weena tumscha un pakre-
liga Deena/ weena Padeb-
un miglaina Deena.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weena Basunes
Skanneschanaß Deena/ pr
wiſſeem ſtipreem Pilſfahtee-
un angſtahm Pillim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es iſbeedeſchu te-
Zilwekus/ ka teem buhß eet
Akleein/ jo tee irr prett to KU-
GU grehkoſſchi/ un wihaß ſihs
taps iſleets ka Pihtchli/
wihaß Meefas taps ka Sub-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir wihaß Sudrabs
wihaß Selts tohs ne iſglah-
tai Bahrſibas Deena ta KU-
GA/ bet zaur to Ugguni wiha-
Karſtuma taps wiha fchi Se-
me aprihta/ jo wihaß darrihs-
beidſamu Gallu itt ahtri ar w-
ſeem ſchahs Seimmes Eedſih-
tajeem.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
